no flaws are evident.\n   - The conclusion that the code is safe and non-malicious is well-supported.\n\n6. **Overall Assessment:**\n   - The code is a standard autogenerated TypeScript declaration file with no malicious or security issues.\n   - The source map embedded as a data URI is common and not suspicious.\n   - No adjustments to scores are necessary.\n\n**Final Recommendations:**\n- Based on the evidence, I would assign the following scores:\n  - **Malware:** 0\n  - **Obfuscated:** 0\n  - **Risk:** 0.1 (to account for the minimal, autogenerated nature, but effectively no risk)\n\n**Summary:**\nAll reports correctly identify the benign nature of this file.
